name: Wheatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the recipe for ground seitan.
2. Place the ground gluten in a large bowl and add the remaining ingredients. Mix well.
3. Using your hands, shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
4. Place them on a well-oiled cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes. Turn the wheatballs over once during the baking to ensure even browning.
5. Serve the wheatballs with a tomato sauce and spaghetti or in a vegetable stew. Or serve with sweet and sour sauce. Wheatballs can be frozen for later use as needed. Store in an airtight freezer bag or another airtight container.
6. Makes 45 balls.
